name: autonomous-ops
description: Master autonomous operations skill for iHhashi. Combines agent-orchestrator (parallel agents), Qwen 3.5 tentacles (multi-model AI), and persistent-agent-memory (stateful agents) into a unified autonomous system.
author: iHhashi

workflows.issue-swarm: Automatically assign GitHub issues to parallel agents with Qwen-powered triage
workflows.review-pipeline: Code review pipeline: classify -> review -> architect feedback
workflows.sa-translate: Batch translate app content to all SA languages
workflows.ops-cycle: Full operational cycle: boot agents, check state, execute, log, handoff
workflows.market-intel: Research SA food delivery market with flagship Qwen model
workflows.deploy-guard: Pre-deployment checks: code review + architecture validation

strategy.model_selection: Automatically select optimal Qwen 3.5 model size per task
strategy.agent_isolation: Each agent runs in its own git worktree via agent-orchestrator
strategy.memory_persistence: All agent activity logged to persistent-agent-memory
strategy.cross_agent_comms: Agents communicate via shared-brain JSON files
strategy.boot_injection: Agents receive prior context at startup (~1,375 tokens)
